title: Renewable Diamonds
description: Allows you to make diamonds from other diamond pieces using a blast furnace.
body:
Allows you to create diamonds from other diamond pieces using a blast furnace.
This is renewable because you can get diamond tools from villagers.

## Pieces
- Diamond armor
- Diamond tools
- Diamond horse armor

![Supported items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49aecf20fbc74d5ca811587078b8ad62c448bde4.png)
